arts.ttl: Brighton vs Ipswich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Ipswich couldn't have asked for a tougher start upon their return to the top flight as they faced Liverpool and Manchester City in their opening two games, but Kieran McKenna's dynamic outfit secured their first point of the season as they drew 1-1 with Fulham on Matchday 3. Brighton & Hove Albion are aiming to maintain their unbeaten start to the 2024/25 season as they welcome the newly-promoted Ipswich Town to the Amex on Saturday.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Brighton v Ipswich

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: 10 players to represent both the Blues and Brighton
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: The midfielder signed for Brighton from Wycombe in the summer of 2004, where he went on to play 22 games, scoring two goals before joining Town for £250k in December of that year. Currie spent three seasons at Portman Road, making 89 appearances for the club and scoring nine goals, including a strike on his debut at QPR.

arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Blues complete ANOTHER Brighton raid
arts.sum: Before Cucurella signed for Chelsea, the club had already purchased teenage youngsters Shumaira Mheuka and Zak Sturge. Potter was sacked after just seven months in the hotseat at Chelsea, and Roberts and Macauley are the only members of his backroom staff still at the club.

arts.sum: The Blues will host Manchester United live on Sky Sports' Super Sunday (Image: PA) This will be shown live on Sky Sports as part of Super Sunday.

arts.sum: “In the Premier League, there are no easy games - especially now against Ipswich, it's a team with a great coach who has a great idea,” he said. “They have great players like Hutchinson, a very, very good number 10 who’s very flexible.
